landing.preamble: Two essays on the same body

a.title: Polyrhythm
a.hint: The body fragmented across different tempos

landing.footnote: choose a door — you can switch any time

bio.short: Dancer, choreographer, anthropologist and cultural organizer. Faculty member at the Institute of Arts, Unicamp. PhD in Performing Arts with research on the Senegalese choreographer Germaine Acogny.
bio.long: Works between Brazil, West Africa, and the United States. Artistic director of Diaspóros Coletivo das Artes (São Paulo), co-editor of the journal O Menelick 2º Ato, and guest artist with Anikaya Dance Theater (Boston). Her work investigates the relationships between body, culture, and coloniality, with emphasis on counter-colonial thought and epistemologies produced in non-hegemonic territories.
